name: Pokey's Beef Dip or Appetizer
recipeIngredient: 1 or 2 pkg Dried beef, cut up or clipped into fine pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend softened cream cheese and milk.
2. Stir in finely chopped beef, onion, green pepper, and black pepper.
3. Mix well; add nuts, sour cream, and horseradish.
4. Spoon the mixture into a baking dish.
5. Sprinkle remaining nuts on top.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes.
7. After cooling, sprinkle with Parmesan cheese if desired.
8. Serve on crackers, breadsticks, vegetables, etc.
